title: The Glitch in the Family Photo

scenes.description: Alex holds a vintage polaroid print between thumb and forefinger in the living room.
Alex turns the pages of a wedding album featuring Father and Mother smiling at a restaurant table.
Alex traces the background of the photograph where a man stands wearing modern wireless earbuds.
Alex presses a magnifying loupe against the physical photograph to examine the blurred face of the man.
Alex drops the polaroid onto the couch and stares blankly at the wall.
